description: Features blocked by missing dependencies. Remove entries when the dependency is implemented.

items.feature: Button `icon` prop accepts a string (icon name) in addition to JSXElement
items.notes: Currently `icon` only accepts JSXElement. Once Icon is built, string values should render <Icon name={string} />.

items.blockedBy: Global hairline mixin or utility CSS class
items.notes: Needs a reusable approach for sub-pixel borders. Consider a CSS utility class or a shared mixin.

items.feature: Icon component (SVG sprite-based or inline SVG)
items.blockedBy: Icon asset pipeline (svg sprite generation or icon font)
items.notes: Old version uses iconfont.js with <symbol> sprites. Need to decide: inline SVGs, sprite sheet, or icon font for the new version.

items.feature: ButtonGroup — groups multiple buttons with proper spacing and corner radius merging
items.notes: Common pattern: adjacent buttons merge border-radius. Also handles vertical/horizontal layout.

items.feature: Loading spinner component used by Button, overlay, and other components
items.notes: Currently Button has its own spinner CSS. A shared Loading component would be more consistent.

items.feature: Overlay/Portal component for modals, action sheets, pickers, toasts
items.notes: Used by ActionSheet, Picker, Toast, Loading (fullscreen). Should support click-to-close and animation.

items.feature: Form context for validation, submit handling, and field registration
items.notes: Old version uses FormValueContext. Need to design a more complete form state management.
